title: Money Expert's Advice After Another Horror Stock Market Fall | 10 News+
description: Australia’s stock market has taken another hit and it’s raising serious concerns about superannuation balances. The ASX has fallen again, wiping out nearly $300 billion in value since the conflict began, leaving millions of Australians worried about their financial future. So what does this mean for your super right now — and could it recover? Money expert Michael McCarthy breaks down what’s happening in the markets and what you should (and shouldn’t) do next. title: The New Smoking Trend Alarming Health Experts | 10 News+
description: Health experts are raising concerns over a worrying new trend, smoking is making a comeback in Australia. Driven by the rise of cheap black market tobacco and shifting social attitudes, more Australians are picking up the habit, despite decades of public health warnings. Authorities say the glamorisation of smoking online is also playing a role, especially among younger people. title: Expert's Warning Over New Smoking Trend | 10 News+
description: Is smoking making a comeback? 👀  Nearly half of cigarettes circulating in Australia are illegal — and it’s driving a concerning spike in smoking.  Backlash over Vanity Fair handing out cigarettes and featuring smoking on its cover has sparked calls for graphic health warnings on all smoking content. title: Trump Warns Iran: "We'll Just Keep Bombing Our Little Hearts Out" | 10 News
description: On Monday, 23 March, US President Donald Trump announced that talks with Iran had made progress, revealing the two sides had reached “major points of agreement.” He said Middle East envoy Steve Witkoff and adviser Jared Kushner met with Iranian officials, with more discussions set to continue. Trump gave orders to postpone strikes on Iranian power plants for five days, warning that if diplomacy fails, “we'll just keep bombing our little hearts out.”  Join the conversation and follow us on: X: https://x.com/10NewsAU Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/10NewsAU/ Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/10NewsAU/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@10NewsAU LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/10newsau  10 News airs at 5pm, seven nights a week in your local market on Network 10.
